zh.Hampshire-Cross, Hampshire, England: 英國哈普爾哈普-可洛斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當William Gifford of itchell於1482年出生在英國英格蘭哈普爾時，他的父親John Gifford26歲，母親Eleanor Brugge19歲。他於1503年與Eleanor Paulet在英國哈普爾哈普-可洛斯結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1549年6月17日在英國巴金哈姆爾華阿登享年67歲，埋葬在英國。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Gifford of itchell于1482年出生在英国英格兰哈普爾时，他的父亲John Gifford26岁，母亲Eleanor Brugge19岁。他于1503年与Eleanor Paulet在英国哈普爾哈普-可洛斯结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1549年6月17日在英国巴金哈姆爾華阿登享年67岁，埋葬在英国。

nameMeanings.name: Gifford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Giffard, either from the Middle English personal name Gifard, derived from an Old French name of this form deriving from ancient Germanic geb- ‘give, gift’ + hard- ‘hardy, brave’, or perhaps sometimes a nickname from Old French gif(f)ard ‘chubby-cheeked, bloated’.

variants.name: Jeffords
meanings: English: variant of Gifford , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When William Gifford of itchell was born in 1482, in Hampshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Gifford, was 26 and his mother, Eleanor Brugge, was 19. He married Eleanor Paulet in 1503, in Hampshire-Cross, Hampshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. He died on 17 June 1549, in Whaddon, Buckinghamshire, England, at the age of 67, and was buried in England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Gifford of itchell est né en 1482, à Hampshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Gifford, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Eleanor Brugge, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Eleanor Paulet en 1503, à Hampshire-Cross, Hampshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 17 juin 1549, à Whaddon, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterré à Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Gifford of itchell 1482 in Hampshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Gifford 26 und seine Mutter Eleanor Brugge 19. Er hat 1503 in Hampshire-Cross, Hampshire, England Eleanor Paulet geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 17. Juni 1549 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Whaddon, Buckinghamshire, England und wurde in England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Gifford of itchell è nato il nel 1482 nel Hampshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John Gifford, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Eleanor Brugge, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Eleanor Paulet nel 1503, nel Hampshire-Cross, Hampshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì il 17 giugno 1549, nel Whaddon, Buckinghamshire, England, all'età di 67 anni, e fu sepolto a England.

ja.lifeSummary: William Gifford of itchellが1482年にイギリスイギリスハンプシュアイアで生まれた時，父John Giffordは26歳，母Eleanor Bruggeは19歳であった。1503年にイギリスハンプシュアイアハンプシュアイレ-クロスでEleanor Pauletと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1549年6月17日にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアウアッドオンで67歳で死去し，イギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Gifford of itchell(이)가 1482년 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Gifford(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Eleanor Brugge(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1503년 영국 함프실르 함프실레-크로스에서 Eleanor Paulet(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1549년 6월 17일 영국 벅잉함실르 화아던에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Gifford of itchell nasceu em 1482, em Hampshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Gifford, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor Brugge, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Eleanor Paulet em 1503, em Hampshire-Cross, Hampshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 17 de junho de 1549, em Whaddon, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, com 67 anos, e foi sepultado em Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Gifford of itchell родился в 1482 г. в местности хампшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Gifford было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Eleanor Brugge, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Eleanor Paulet в 1503 г. в местности хампшире-кросс, хампшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Он умер 17 июня 1549 г. в местности уаддон, буккингхамшир, Англия в возрасте 67 лет и был похоронен в местности Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Gifford of itchell nació en 1482, en Hampshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Gifford, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Eleanor Brugge, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Eleanor Paulet en 1503, en Hampshire-Cross, Hampshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió el 17 de junio de 1549, en Whaddon, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 67 años, y fue sepultado en Inglaterra.
